summary: All sections verified (1-6 + integrator + 7). Edge-case suite: 32/32 PASS (Node-runnable static + pure-module assertions; live-browser/Firebase clauses of PNV.1 deferred to first deploy per README). Two inline deviations logged: dev-001 (client-side VAPID signing per briefing) and dev-002 (integrator build-manifest moved to _build-manifest.json to avoid colliding with the Web App Manifest at output/integration/manifest.json). Deliverable lives under output/integration/ and resolves under a GitHub Pages project subpath.
